highlights: Capstone: LLM hallucination detection and evaluation
Coursework: machine learning, databases, distributed systems, algorithms

outcomes: Built REST endpoints in Python (FastAPI) serving 2k requests/day
Added pytest coverage that caught 3 regressions before release
Wrote SQL reporting queries over a Postgres warehouse
Prototyped a retrieval-augmented QA system over a document corpus
Ran embedding-similarity experiments and reported precision/recall

projects.name: LLM Evaluation Harness
projects.description: A golden-dataset harness that measures hallucination/grounding rate for LLM outputs, with a regression gate in CI.
outcomes: Automated grounding-rate and fabrication-rate assertions across 50 cases
Caught a model regression that dropped grounding rate by 9 points

projects.name: RAG Job Copilot
projects.description: A retrieval-augmented app that drafts grounded application documents from a profile, with a claim-to-evidence verifier.
outcomes: Implemented hybrid retrieval (dense + sparse) fused with Reciprocal Rank Fusion
Built a grounding verifier that strips unsupported claims

projects.name: Model Regression Detection
projects.description: A monitoring study that detects quality drift between model versions on a fixed evaluation set.
outcomes: Defined drift metrics and visualised version-over-version deltas
